name: Defensor Scientiae

sheet.name: Defensor Scientiae
sheet.background_story:
One of Luta's followers that became enamored with Stalwart Fortress and the power of the knowledge within.

He fused himself with an ancient device to prolong his life in service of defending the tomes of The Strivers after Luta's leaving.

Since, he has stood guard over the deepest libraries. None have breached his chamber.

He has a friendly relationship with another defender, Pilosus Telum.

After the death of Zell he has grown increasingly preoccupied with his studies and carries his tomes around, weaponized as a mallet.

In the year passing, he grew increasingly fascinated with The World Maker and the machinery of The Operator's Chamber, and begun to design experiments using it.
